summary: Reporter requests 16 KB ELF page size alignment for libSkiaSharp.so to comply with Google Play's Android 16+ requirement. This was already fixed in PR #3096 (merged Dec 2024) which updated the Android NDK to r27c and added -Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384 linker flag, backported to v3.116.1 and v3.118.0-preview.2.

bugSignals.errorMessage: libSkiaSharp.so has 4 KB page size, incompatible with Android 16+ requirement for 16 KB page size

stepsToReproduce: Create a .NET MAUI Android app targeting Android 16
Build AAB using SkiaSharp v2.88.6 or v3.116.0
Run page size check on libSkiaSharp.so
Observe 4 KB page size instead of required 16 KB
reproEvidence.environmentDetails: SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.Android v2.88.6 / v3.116.0, .NET MAUI 9.0, Android 16+ target, Visual Studio (Windows)

repoLinks.description: PR #3096: Update Android NDK to r27c and 16kb alignment (MERGED)

versionAnalysis.relevanceReason: The 16 KB page alignment fix was merged in PR #3096 on Dec 4, 2024 and backported to v3.116.1. All versions from v3.116.1 onward include the fix. Reporter's versions (2.88.6, 3.116.0) predate the fix.

fixStatus.reason: PR #3096 added -Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384 to Android linker flags and updated NDK to r27c. Backported to v3.116.1 (PR #3098) and v3.118.0-preview.2 (PR #3099). The fix is confirmed present in native/android/build.cake line 43.

analysis.summary: The 16 KB page size alignment issue for Android was already addressed in PR #3096 (merged Dec 4, 2024), which updated the Android NDK to r27c and added the -Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384 linker flag to both libSkiaSharp and libHarfBuzzSharp builds. The fix was backported to v3.116.1 and v3.118.0-preview.2. The reporter is using pre-fix versions (2.88.6 mentioned in body, 3.116.0 in version field). Upgrading to v3.116.1 or later resolves the issue.
analysis.rationale: Classified as type/bug because the native library's 4 KB page alignment actively prevents deployment to Android 16+ via Google Play. area/libSkiaSharp.native because it's a native build configuration issue. Suggesting close-as-fixed because PR #3096 with the exact fix (max-page-size=16384 linker flag) is already merged and released in v3.116.1+. The 2.x series is unsupported and will not receive this fix.

keySignals.text: Google Play now requires all 64-bit native libraries to use 16 KB memory page size starting with Android 16+
keySignals.interpretation: Compliance requirement from Google — apps with 4 KB aligned .so files will be rejected.

keySignals.text: libSkiaSharp.so included in SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.Android v2.88.6 has a 4 KB page size
keySignals.interpretation: Reporter is on a pre-fix version. The 2.x series is unsupported.

keySignals.text: Have you tried the 3.x series of SkiaSharp? The 2.x series is not really supported and will be really hard to build with all the out of date components.
keySignals.interpretation: Maintainer directed reporter to 3.x series which contains the fix.

codeInvestigation.finding: extra_ldflags already contains '-Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384' — the 16 KB alignment fix is present in current code
LOCAL_LDFLAGS also includes -Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384 — libHarfBuzzSharp.so is also fixed

workarounds: Upgrade to SkiaSharp v3.116.1 or later, which includes the 16 KB page alignment fix

resolution.hypothesis: The reporter is using a pre-fix version of SkiaSharp. The 16 KB page alignment was added in PR #3096 and released in v3.116.1.

proposals.title: Upgrade to SkiaSharp v3.116.1+
proposals.description: Upgrade SkiaSharp NuGet packages to v3.116.1 or later. This version includes the 16 KB page alignment fix (PR #3096) with -Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384 linker flag and Android NDK r27c.

resolution.recommendedReason: The exact fix (16 KB ELF page alignment) is already released. No code changes needed — just a NuGet package upgrade.

actionability.reason: PR #3096 added 16 KB page alignment to Android native builds and was backported to v3.116.1 (released Dec 2024). Upgrading resolves the issue.

actions.description: Labels are already correct — type/bug, area/libSkiaSharp.native, os/Android, tenet/compatibility
Inform reporter the fix is available in v3.116.1+
actions.comment:
Thanks for reporting this. The 16 KB page size alignment for `libSkiaSharp.so` and `libHarfBuzzSharp.so` on Android was addressed in PR #3096, which updated the Android NDK to r27c and added the `-Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384` linker flag.

This fix is available in **SkiaSharp v3.116.1** and later. Upgrading your SkiaSharp NuGet packages to v3.116.1+ should resolve the Google Play compliance issue for Android 16+.

Note that the 2.88.x series is no longer actively supported and will not receive this fix. As @mattleibow mentioned, the 3.x series is the recommended path forward.

Would you be able to confirm whether upgrading to v3.116.1 (or the latest v3.x release) resolves the page size check for your builds?
